# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Source of truth

The repository's top-level [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) is the authoritative source of truth for all conventions, workflows, build/test commands, and contribution rules in this repository.

## Comment formatting (required)

When you leave any comment — in pull request reviews, on issues, or inline on code — you MUST begin every comment with the following line, exactly as written, on its own line before any other text:

> 🤖 _This comment was generated by Copilot._ It is intended as guidance to maintainers, not as required action for contributors.

### Example

> 🤖 _This comment was generated by Copilot._ It is intended as guidance to maintainers, not as required action for contributors.
>
> Consider extracting this validation into a helper so it can be reused by
> the create and update paths.
